flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Felician University fell 28% between 2006 and 2009 (21.0% → 15.1%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Felician University rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($35.7k → $39.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Felician University rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($35.7k → $39.3k).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Felician University are 1% above 6-year earnings ($57.0k → $57.6k).
